Feedback:
Olá, obrigado por me enviar sua faixa.

Sem dúvidas é um trabalho de muita qualidade. Gostamos de como a instrumentalização flui e tem um dinamismo presente, mas, para a nossa curadoria de Indie Rock, sentimos falta de um peso maior no vocal que acompanhe essa força do instrumental. Valorizamos muito seus vocais, mas, nesta faixa, eles acabaram soando um pouco contidos em relação à potência da banda. É apenas uma questão de alinhamento com a energia que buscamos hoje. Embora não tenhamos conseguido encaixá-la desta vez, esperamos poder trabalhar juntos em um próximo lançamento.

The bass really stood out to me on this, it carries the track nicely and the warm tones you've weaved in ontop make for a real nice sound. Love the drop in to just the vocals at 1:11 too, builds nicely back into the track! For me this just leaned a little more into a nostalgic rock sound and for the playlist I tend to focus on tracks with a more modern feel to them. Keep in mind this is just one opinion and not a direct reflection of your art - stay creating!

Hey thanks for submitting!  I enjoyed the arrangement and the way the guitars and bass interplayed with eachother.  I am declining because I didnt think this song was as catchy as a more pop leaning song like this needs to be

Really great recording and mix on this song and I really like the chorus section which feels indie alternative and modern, but there are some sections in the verses which feel a bit more classic rock than would fit in our playlist. I think you will have good luck with straighter rock playlists and possibly some classic rock vibe ones.
Although I don't hate this track at all, it's just lacking that angst metal or punk edge my audience looks for. I am so sorry!

I think the song is quite catchy. The lyrics are well-written and have some fetching lines. Instrumentally, the arrangement is accomplished and builds up smoothly as well. Sadly though, it's a bit too easy going and lighthearted to fit well on any of my current playlists. All the best with this release anyway.

Hey there, thanks for sharing this one with us! Wonderful vocals, this track is really accessible. It's less of a rock style than what we tend to feature on our site, but we hope to hear future singles that may be a better fit. Cheers!

Hey there,
Thanks for sharing your music with me!
I didn’t even needed to finish the song to know I was going to add it😍👌
I really enjoyed listening to it and I would love to give you a proper share with all the reach you deserve !
Unfortunately the playlist where I see this song fitting in perfectly, has a relatively small audience, so i can only give it a shout out for now.
Thanks for sharing your work, I’m already looking forward to hear more of your music in the future !
Have a great day, and thanks again 😁🙏

I do like the song. Well performed and the vocal is ace, Personally, I just felt it a little mellow for what we cover. Has a slight 80s feel, Robert Palmer a little.

Hi there,
Thank you for sending me your song Great Riddance. Overall, I thought it had a nice atmosphere. Unfortunately, I didn't manage to connect fully with it still. It's a tad more old-school than what I'm currently after. If it doesn't make it for me, I am certain it will work well for other curators. Keep it going!
Cheers,
Léa

Hey there,

Such an amazing vocal performance, and I truly appreciate how it harmonizes with the overall sound. The song showcases fantastic instrumental lines, and I particularly enjoy the pleasing and laid-back rhythm. However, I must admit that, at this moment, it feels slightly too slow for my playlists. While this track won't be on the playlist, I want to acknowledge your talent and determination. Keep pushing forward, and your music will find its audience.

Have a wonderful day,
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/5fThEsl1Fc22fRlv5OyuhF

Hi, Socially Acceptable.
Thank you for reaching out and sharing your track. Love the guitar melodies and its harmony with the drums. As much as I like your track, I have to admit that the singing is not really my cup of tea. Please note that this is just my opinion. You are really creative but I'm looking for music that's more adjacent to Maroon 5 or Coldplay. Despite this, I'm sure many others would add your track to their playlists. Please continue to create more music because I can see your talent shining through. Take care and good luck in your music journey!

Hi Socially acceptable,

What I liked about the track is the the vocals are very clear and professional. I can see the track doing very well for that reason. The melodies however are not 100% convincing me, I am just not completely feeling the vibe with them. So I won’t be able to add it to the list but I really do wish you a massive amount of good luck on your road to success and hope all your dreams come true!!

Have a fantastic day,
Arne

Feedback: A blend of confident 90s esque rock and roll with some 70s esque guitar riffs and a groovy and smooth charm to its structure and production. Well made and it hits with an authentic nature. But there was a more unique new spark missing to just grab us as much as we hoped. We are really so sorry to politely pass this time around
